topics.title: Individual Income Tax Filing
topics.summary: YA 2025 filing deadline 18 April (e-filing) or 15 April (paper). Top marginal rate 24% on income >S$1m.

topics.title: CPF Contributions
topics.summary: Employee 20% + Employer 17% (under 55). Ordinary Wage ceiling S$7,400/month (2025). Only Singapore citizens and PRs contribute.

topics.title: GST
topics.summary: GST 9% standard rate (raised from 8% on 1 Jan 2024). Compulsory registration for turnover >S$1m. Quarterly GST returns.

topics.title: Corporate Income Tax
topics.summary: Headline 17%. Partial tax exemption on first S$200,000. Estimated Chargeable Income (ECI) due within 3 months of year-end; Form C-S/C by 30 November.

topics.title: Auto-Inclusion Scheme (AIS)
topics.summary: Employers with ≥5 employees must submit IR8A data electronically to IRAS by 1 March.
